title: Blackspur BB-BH208 Cable Bicycle Lock
features: Manufactured with a steel cable and polypropylene lock head
It has a PVC cover for protection and to help prevent corrosion
description: Product Description Blackspur bicycle lock is manufactured with a steel cable and polypropylene (PP) lock head. The cable has a PVC cover for protection and to help prevent corrosion. It also supplied with 2 keys. Carded packaging. Size: 650mm. Supplying quality products. One of the most comprehensive ranges of hand tools and DIY associated products in the UK. Box Contains 1x Bicycle Lock
